display_name: 高考前夜全城停电 Cast

en.name: Lin Yu
en.summary: Repeat test taker trying to keep one night of darkness from undoing a year.

en.name: Teacher Chen
en.summary: High school teacher checking on students instead of sleeping.

en.name: Wang's Mother
en.summary: Parent trying to help without making the pressure worse.

en.name: Wang Chen
en.summary: Exam candidate looking for light, quiet, and a way to stay steady.

en.name: Old Zhao
en.summary: Hotel owner turning spare rooms and sockets into an emergency plan.

en.name: Officer Xu
en.summary: Traffic officer clearing routes for students and repair crews.

en.name: Engineer Ma
en.summary: Power crew lead chasing the fault before rumor outruns the fix.

en.name: Section Chief Zhou
en.summary: Education bureau staffer coordinating notices, schools, and anxious parents.

en.name: Wind Vane Media
en.summary: Social account amplifying every rumor that sounds useful or scary.

en.name: Print Shop Auntie
en.summary: Print shop owner helping students recover documents and admission slips.

en.name: Boarding Student Azhe
en.summary: Boarding student trying to study while the dorm goes dark.

en.name: Grandpa Neighbor
en.summary: Retired electrician who can still read a breaker panel by touch.

en.name: Inspector Du Min
en.summary: Exam inspector keeping contingency rules practical.

en.name: Driver Liu
en.summary: Taxi driver moving candidates through blocked streets.
